Verified Reviews

Get a Free Estimate

What Your Neighbors Have to Say

Read More Reviews →
M
Maria G.

Orta Metalworks installed a beautiful wrought iron fence around my property in Sam Hughes. The quality of the work is outstanding, and the fence looks fantastic. The team was professional and efficient, and they completed the project on time and within budget. I highly recommend them!

D
David S.

I needed a chain link fence installed quickly to secure my business property. Orta Metalworks was able to get the job done fast and at a reasonable price. There were a few minor snags, but they addressed them promptly. Overall, I'm very satisfied with the service.

L
Linda K.

My wood fence was damaged in a recent storm. Orta Metalworks came out and repaired it quickly and professionally. They matched the existing wood perfectly, and the fence looks as good as new. I appreciate their prompt service and attention to detail.

R
Robert B.

We hired Orta Metalworks to install an automatic gate at our ranch. They were very knowledgeable and helpful in choosing the right system for our needs. The installation was smooth, and the gate works perfectly. It has made life so much easier. Great job!

Additional Fence Contractor Services

Orta Metalworks LLC — Certified Professionals

Our team brings certified expertise and years of experience to every fence contractor project. We stand behind our work with comprehensive warranties and a commitment to quality.

More About Us →

The Orta Metalworks LLC Way

Our proven process ensures every project is completed with precision, transparency, and care.

1

Consultation

We start with a thorough, no-obligation assessment. Our certified team evaluates your needs and provides a detailed report with recommendations.

2

Plan & Prepare

We work with you to determine the best approach for your specific fence contractor needs. Our experts ensure the right plan for quality results.

3

Get It Done

Our skilled team gets to work with precision and efficiency. We maintain a clean, organized environment and keep you informed every step of the way.

4

Quality Check

Before we consider any job complete, our team performs a comprehensive quality review. We verify every detail meets our exacting standards.

5

Wrap Up

Transparent pricing with no surprises. You only pay when you're 100% satisfied with the work. We offer flexible options to make the process seamless.

Proudly Serving Tucson & Beyond

As a locally owned and operated company, we're proud to serve customers throughout Tucson, AZ and the surrounding communities. Our team brings local expertise and dedication to every project.

Tucson Oro Valley Marana Sahuarita Green Valley Catalina Foothills Vail Corona de Tucson
Let's Get Started →

Frequently Asked Questions

Get answers to the most common questions about our fence contractor services.

How long will a wrought iron fence last in Tucson's climate?

With proper maintenance and protective coatings, a wrought iron fence from Orta Metalworks LLC can last for decades, even in the harsh Arizona climate.

Can you customize the design of my wrought iron fence?

Absolutely! We specialize in custom designs and can create a fence that perfectly complements your home's architecture and your personal style.

What type of maintenance is required for wrought iron fences?

Regular cleaning and occasional touch-up painting are typically all that's needed to keep your wrought iron fence looking its best. We also offer maintenance services to ensure its longevity.

Built on Tucson Values

Get a free quote for your custom fence project. Call now to schedule a consultation.

Let's Begin →
